metadata.description: Humand Solutions Map — module-level knowledge base. Value propositions are used by the AI to semantically match client opportunity areas to relevant modules.

modules.value_proposition: A centralized, mobile-first feed that ensures every employee — regardless of location, shift, or role — can receive, engage with, and respond to company communications in real time.
features: Post updates, alerts, and quick surveys with rich media support (video, images, PDFs, links)
Segment content by location, department, team, or role
Employees interact through comments, reactions, and GIFs
Admins control who can post and who can view each piece of content
key_messages: Replace fragmented emails and printed notices with one digital channel
Reach frontline and deskless employees who don't have corporate email
Enable two-way communication — not just top-down broadcasting
proof_points: 34% reduction in time for employees to receive updates
25% reduction in communication costs
30% reduction in unnecessary emails and paperwork

modules.value_proposition: Targeted communication channels that allow organizations to create segmented spaces where specific teams, locations, or functions can share information and collaborate without noise.
features: Create groups by team, location, project, or any custom criteria
Each group has its own wall and content feed
Configurable posting permissions per group
Support for all file types including video, images, and documents
key_messages: Eliminate information overload by giving each team their own channel
Operational updates reach the right people — not everyone
Build community within specific teams or locations
proof_points: 30% reduction in unnecessary communication noise
Supervisors report faster team response to operational updates

modules.value_proposition: A digital publication space that gives organizations a dedicated, professional channel for institutional news, achievements, and important announcements — separate from the day-to-day feed.
features: Publish articles with rich formatting, images, and embedded media
Supports all file types including videos, PDFs, and links
Separate from the social feed — designed for formal communications
key_messages: Elevate institutional communications beyond a generic news feed
Give leadership a professional channel to share company news and milestones
Improve the perception and reach of internal communications
proof_points: 25% reduction in communication costs
Increased engagement with institutional content vs email newsletters

modules.value_proposition: A built-in live broadcast tool that lets organizations stream company events, town halls, and leadership messages directly to all employees — with real-time interaction and post-event replay.
features: Stream from desktop or mobile to the entire workforce
Real-time comments and Q&A during the broadcast
Push notifications to alert employees when a stream starts
Save and share recordings for employees who missed the live event
Live viewer statistics and engagement tracking
key_messages: Connect distributed teams to leadership in real time
Replace expensive in-person events with scalable digital broadcasts
Increase participation with interactive comments and Q&A
proof_points: 300% increase in employee engagement with company events
Significant reduction in event logistics costs

modules.value_proposition: A structured internal messaging system that combines direct communication with organized support channels — enabling faster, more accountable responses to employee questions and requests.
features: Direct and group messaging between employees
Create dedicated consultation channels for specific topics
Configure automated responses and FAQ sections
Track and manage queries as tickets for accountability
Share all file types within conversations
key_messages: Move employee queries out of email inboxes and into organized channels
Reduce response time with automated answers to common questions
Create accountability for every employee request
proof_points: Significant reduction in email volume for HR and operations teams
Faster resolution times for employee queries

modules.value_proposition: Native voice and video calling built into the Humand platform, enabling face-to-face collaboration between employees without switching to external tools.
features: One-on-one and group voice or video calls
Available on mobile and desktop
Push notifications for incoming calls
Integrated within private chats — no external app needed
key_messages: Eliminate the need for external video conferencing tools for internal calls
Keep all employee communication within one secure platform
Enable quick decision-making with instant face-to-face access
proof_points: 20% faster decision-making enabled by instant communication
Reduced dependency on external tools improves IT governance

modules.value_proposition: A no-code workflow builder that allows HR and operations teams to digitize any internal process — from simple requests to multi-step approvals — and give employees mobile access to submit and track them.
features: Create fully custom digital forms for any internal procedure
Configure multi-step approval workflows by role or position
Employees submit requests and track status from any device
Full audit trail and record of every procedure
Notifications at each step of the approval process
key_messages: Eliminate paper forms, email chains, and manual approval processes
Give employees 24/7 access to submit any HR or operational request
Standardize processes across all locations and teams
proof_points: 2.3x increase in HR team productivity
3 hours saved per employee per week
30% reduction in paperwork and manual processes

modules.value_proposition: A complete vacation and leave management system that gives employees self-service control over their time off while giving HR full visibility, policy configurability, and calendar integration.
features: Employees request vacations, leaves, and permissions from the app
Real-time visibility into available and used leave balances
HR receives instant alerts on new requests
Configurable approval workflows and leave policies
Calendar integration and automatic notifications
Reports on who is out of office at any time
key_messages: Replace email-based leave management with a self-service system
Give HR immediate visibility and control over all time-off requests
Eliminate errors and delays in leave tracking and payroll
proof_points: Significant reduction in HR time spent processing leave requests
30% reduction in manual administrative processes

modules.value_proposition: A secure digital document distribution and signature system that allows HR to send, collect, and store signed documents from any employee — eliminating paper entirely.
features: Distribute recurring documents and payslips to employees digitally
Employees can view and sign documents from any device, anywhere
Secure, organized storage for all employee documents
Full visibility into who has and hasn't signed
key_messages: Eliminate paper documents and manual signature collection
Ensure compliance with a complete digital audit trail
Give employees instant access to their own documents at any time
proof_points: 30% reduction in paperwork
Compliance risk reduced with complete digital signature records

modules.value_proposition: A structured internal ticketing system that brings accountability and transparency to HR, IT, and operational support requests — ensuring every employee need is tracked and resolved efficiently.
features: Employees submit requests from any device with ease
Track request status, assigned agent, and estimated resolution time
Direct communication channel between requester and agent
Reassign tickets based on availability or specialization
Create and configure custom service types for any department
key_messages: Replace informal support requests with a structured, trackable system
Give employees full transparency on the status of their requests
Ensure nothing falls through the cracks in HR, IT, or operations
proof_points: Significant reduction in unresolved or lost employee requests
2.3x increase in HR team productivity through structured workflows

modules.value_proposition: A configurable digital onboarding journey that guides new hires through their first days with structured steps, automated notifications, and full HR visibility into progress at every stage.
features: Design custom onboarding flows with tasks, steps, and due dates
Automated notifications guide new hires through each step
HR can track which stage each employee is at in real time
Deliver culture, values, and role expectations digitally before day one
Integrated with documents for digital signature collection
key_messages: Standardize onboarding across all roles and locations
Reduce time-to-productivity for new hires
Eliminate manual HR coordination during onboarding
proof_points: 82% increase in employee retention
Automated process reduces HR administrative burden significantly

modules.value_proposition: A simple booking system that lets employees reserve shared spaces — meeting rooms, desks, or any physical resource — directly from the app, eliminating scheduling conflicts and manual coordination.
features: Employees book spaces from mobile or desktop in seconds
Real-time availability visibility
Configurable space types and booking rules
Automated confirmations and reminders
key_messages: Eliminate back-and-forth emails to reserve meeting rooms or shared spaces
Give employees instant visibility into space availability
Centralize all workplace logistics within one platform
proof_points: 3 hours saved per employee per week across administrative tasks
Reduced friction in hybrid and flexible workplace environments

modules.value_proposition: A centralized launcher that gives every employee one-click access to all the tools, platforms, and resources they need — eliminating the need to remember multiple URLs or switch between apps.
features: Add quick links to any website, platform, app, file, or resource
Organized and accessible from the main Humand interface
Segmentable by role, team, or location
Supports integration with HR, payroll, and operational systems
key_messages: Give employees one place to access everything they need
Reduce time lost switching between systems and looking for tools
Increase adoption of existing HR and operational platforms
proof_points: 25% reduction in IT costs
Increased adoption of existing enterprise tools

modules.value_proposition: Native connectors to the most widely used HR, identity, and enterprise platforms — allowing Humand to become the unified front door that works with your existing tech stack rather than replacing it.
features: Native integrations with SAP, Active Directory, Office365, Google Workspace, Workday, Meta4, PeopleSoft, and more
SSO and identity provider compatibility for secure access
Centralize all content and tools without duplicating data
API-ready architecture for custom integrations
key_messages: Connect your entire HR stack without replacing what already works
Give IT full governance and security control over employee access
One login — one platform — all tools
proof_points: 25% reduction in IT costs
Enterprise-grade security certified by the world's largest organizations

modules.value_proposition: A living employee directory that helps people find colleagues, understand who does what, and build connections across the organization — especially valuable in large or distributed companies.
features: Employees create personalized profiles with role, contact info, interests, and skills
Searchable company-wide directory
Quick access buttons for contacting or connecting with any colleague
Supports relationship-building across teams and locations
key_messages: Help employees find the right person quickly in large organizations
Build connections across teams, locations, and departments
Reduce silos by making the organization visible and accessible
proof_points: Improved cross-functional collaboration in distributed organizations
Faster onboarding as new hires can immediately find and connect with colleagues

modules.value_proposition: An always up-to-date visual representation of the company's organizational structure — automatically maintained as employees join, leave, or change roles.
features: Visual org chart auto-updated as employee records change
New employees are added automatically
Helps employees understand reporting lines and team structures
Accessible from mobile and desktop
key_messages: Eliminate outdated org charts maintained manually in PowerPoint or Excel
Give every employee clarity on the company structure and who to go to
Streamline communication by knowing exactly who owns what
proof_points: Faster decision-making when reporting lines are clear
Reduces misdirected communication and requests

modules.value_proposition: A structured, visible recognition system that lets organizations celebrate employee achievements and reinforce company values — making appreciation a daily habit rather than an occasional gesture.
features: Recognize employees tied to specific company values or behaviors
Configurable recognition flows: peer-to-peer, manager-to-employee, or company-wide
Points system redeemable for prizes and perks
Recognition visible across the organization in the social feed
Reports on recognition activity and participation
key_messages: Make recognition visible, frequent, and tied to real company values
Enable peer recognition — not just top-down praise
Drive retention by making employees feel seen and valued
proof_points: 300% increase in employee engagement
82% improvement in employee retention

modules.value_proposition: An automated milestone celebration tool that ensures no birthday or work anniversary goes unnoticed — reinforcing a culture of appreciation without requiring manual HR coordination.
features: Automatic visibility of employee birthdays and work anniversaries
Notifications to teams and managers
Integrated with the social feed to amplify celebrations
key_messages: Never miss a milestone — automate the moments that matter
Strengthen the employee-company relationship through consistent recognition
Build culture through small, frequent moments of appreciation
proof_points: Improved employee sentiment in organizations that celebrate milestones consistently
Zero HR coordination required once configured

modules.value_proposition: A flexible survey tool that allows HR and operations teams to gather employee feedback on any topic — quickly, at scale, and with real-time results segmented by team, location, or department.
features: Create and distribute surveys to any segment of the workforce
Real-time response tracking and analytics
Segment results by team, department, or location
Support for multiple question types
key_messages: Get employee input on any topic in minutes — not weeks
Make decisions based on real data, not assumptions
Show employees their voice matters by acting on feedback quickly
proof_points: Faster decision cycles enabled by real-time survey data
Higher participation rates vs email surveys

modules.value_proposition: A science-backed employee engagement measurement platform that gives HR and area leaders continuous, actionable visibility into workforce sentiment — enabling proactive action before disengagement becomes turnover.
features: Engagement surveys built with validated psychometric methodology
Real-time dashboards with participation tracking
Filtered views by area, team, or location for managers and leaders
Trend tracking over time to identify improving or declining areas
Anonymized responses to encourage honest feedback
key_messages: Move from annual engagement surveys to continuous pulse measurement
Give every area leader visibility into their own team's engagement
Identify risks before they become turnover
proof_points: 300% increase in employee engagement reported by customers
82% improvement in employee retention

modules.value_proposition: A flexible content hub that lets organizations publish and organize important company information — from benefits and policies to job openings and cultural values — in a user-friendly, always accessible format.
features: Display any type of content in a structured, readable format
Publish benefits, policies, cultural values, job openings, and product information
Segmentable by role, location, or team
Accessible from mobile and desktop
key_messages: Give employees a single source of truth for company information
Replace outdated intranets that no one visits
Make company culture and values tangible and accessible
proof_points: 10% average adoption rate from day one
Significant reduction in repetitive HR questions about policies and benefits

modules.value_proposition: A secure, organized document repository that gives employees role-based access to the files, resources, and reference materials they need — from anywhere, on any device.
features: Create organized folder structures for any type of content
Supports all file types: videos, images, PDFs, Excel, Word, links
Segment access by role, team, location, or group
Mobile accessible for frontline and field employees
key_messages: Replace shared drives and email attachments with an organized, accessible repository
Ensure frontline employees can find what they need from the field
Control who sees what with role-based access
proof_points: Reduced time employees spend searching for documents
Improved compliance with controlled document access

modules.value_proposition: A mobile-first learning management system that allows organizations to create, assign, and track role-specific training at scale — ensuring compliance, consistency, and accessibility for every employee.
features: Create multi-format courses: video, text, quizzes, and interactive content
Assign training by role, department, location, or team with due dates
Automated push notifications for pending or expiring courses
Full reporting on completion rates, quiz scores, and participation
Mobile-first delivery for frontline and field employees
key_messages: Deliver consistent training to every employee regardless of location or shift
Track compliance certifications without manual follow-up
Reduce training costs by replacing in-person sessions with digital delivery
proof_points: 18% reduction in training costs
Compliance tracking eliminates manual HR follow-up
Frontline employees complete training faster with mobile delivery

modules.value_proposition: A configurable performance evaluation system that moves organizations beyond annual reviews — enabling continuous feedback cycles, multi-directional assessments, and goal accountability.
features: Configurable evaluation forms: 360°, upward, downward, and peer review
Define and manage evaluation cycles with company-wide visibility
Continuous feedback loops with comment history on goals
Track individual and team performance over time
key_messages: Replace one-time annual reviews with ongoing performance conversations
Give managers and employees a shared view of progress and expectations
Enable fair, structured assessments at any organizational level
proof_points: 20% faster decision-making enabled by performance visibility
Reduced time spent in review administration cycles

modules.value_proposition: A goal management system that connects individual accountability to company strategy — giving employees, managers, and leaders a shared, real-time view of progress across the organization.
features: Create, assign, and track individual and collective goals
Multiple measurement types: binary, numerical, percentage, monetary
Define evaluation cycles for a company-wide view of all goals
Progress updates with comments and recorded history
Segment goals by individual, team, department, or company level
key_messages: Align every employee's work to company-level objectives
Give managers real-time visibility into team progress without status meetings
Create a culture of accountability through transparent goal tracking
proof_points: 20% faster decision-making with clear goal visibility
Reduction in goal-setting meetings with always-updated progress dashboards

modules.value_proposition: A career growth framework that gives employees clarity on what success looks like in their role and what it takes to advance — turning managers into coaches and reducing turnover driven by lack of growth visibility.
features: Define role expectations and competency frameworks per position
Employees can see their growth path within the company
Managers are equipped to have meaningful development conversations
Linked to performance reviews for a unified talent development view
key_messages: Give employees a clear answer to 'what does growing here look like?'
Reduce turnover caused by lack of career development visibility
Turn every manager into a coach with structured development tools
proof_points: 82% improvement in employee retention
Reduced regrettable turnover in organizations with clear career frameworks

modules.value_proposition: A shift management system that gives operations teams full control over complex schedules — and gives frontline employees real-time visibility into their own shifts — eliminating confusion and coordination overhead.
features: Create and manage complex shift schedules for frontline teams
Employees access their schedules from mobile in real time
Shift updates communicated instantly via push notification
Supports multiple locations and shift patterns
key_messages: Eliminate scheduling confusion for managers and frontline workers
Reduce no-shows and coverage gaps with real-time schedule visibility
Coordinate distributed teams across shifts and locations from one place
proof_points: 3 hours saved per employee per week
Supervisors report faster team response to scheduling changes

modules.value_proposition: A digital time and attendance system that gives frontline employees a simple way to clock in and out — with geolocation, automated reminders, and clean payroll-ready reports for HR and operations.
features: Clock in/out from mobile with geolocation capture
Automated reminders to ensure accurate marking
Downloadable reports filterable by team, location, or date
Work location indicated at start and end of each day
key_messages: Eliminate manual time sheets and payroll errors
Give HR accurate, real-time attendance data without chasing employees
Ensure compliance with labor regulations through digital records
proof_points: 3 hours saved per employee per week
Payroll processing time significantly reduced with accurate digital records

modules.value_proposition: An internal peer-to-peer marketplace that creates community by giving employees a safe, organized space to buy and sell second-hand items within the company.
features: Employees post items for sale with photos and descriptions
Configurable categories for different product types
Safe, moderated environment within the company platform
key_messages: Build a sense of community through peer connection beyond work
Add a unique employee benefit with zero cost to the company
Increase daily app engagement through non-work interactions
proof_points: Increased daily platform engagement
Employees report stronger sense of community in organizations with peer exchange features

modules.value_proposition: An AI-powered conversational assistant that gives every employee instant, accurate answers to HR questions and guides them through processes — 24/7, without requiring HR team involvement.
features: Natural language AI assistant accessible via mobile and desktop
Answers questions about HR policies, benefits, processes, and procedures
Guides employees through forms and workflows autonomously
Trained on the company's own knowledge base and documentation
Escalation paths to human agents when needed
Analytics on most common questions and knowledge gaps
key_messages: Give every employee an always-available HR assistant in their pocket
Reduce HR ticket volume from repetitive, low-value questions
Free HR teams to focus on strategic work — not answering FAQs
proof_points: 2.3x increase in HR team productivity
Available 24/7 regardless of time zone, shift, or business hours
